title: Game Theory
description: Model strategic interaction: prisoner's dilemma, Nash equilibria, mixed strategies, and auctions. Understand why rational players sometimes trap themselves in bad outcomes — and how mechanism design, repeated play, and commitments can break the trap.
persona: For anyone who negotiates, competes, or cooperates. No prerequisites beyond basic probability; every concept is grounded in concrete two-player games before generalizing.
tagline: Find equilibria where no one wants to deviate.
